top_signals.title: Board of Peace official Gaza fund is empty despite pledges, source says
top_signals.summary: Since the board was set up, its fund — administered by the World Bank and endorsed by the United Nations — has received no money from donors, the source said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
